issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): input elements are 13x13px (10 instances) (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): select elements are 79x21px (2 instances) (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): switch elements are 13x13px (3 instances) (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Content uses only 19% of the desktop width (1280px): it stays in a narrow, mobile-shaped band instead of adapting to the available space.
issues.suggestion: Let the layout grow with the viewport using Marigold responsive primitives — <Columns collapseAt="..."> for multi-column areas, AppLayout for the shell, Stack/Inline for flow — instead of a fixed-width container. (Intentionally centred max-width reading columns are fine and may trip this; treat it as a relative signal.)

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <input> (input) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > input:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Interactive element <textarea> (textarea) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(3) > textarea:nth-child(2)

issues.message: Interactive element <button> (button) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(4) > button:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Interactive element <input> (switch) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(4) > label:nth-child(1) > span:nth-child(1) > input:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Element <button> has no visible focus indicator when focused (WCAG 2.4.7).
issues.suggestion: Marigold components provide built-in focus rings via the theme. For custom elements, add an outline or box-shadow on :focus-visible.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(1) > h3:nth-child(1) > button:nth-child(1)
